description: IDAM by Alain Ducasse is the most iconic restaurant in Doha — a one-Michelin-star contemporary French destination on the fifth floor of the Museum of Islamic Art, the legendary I.M. Pei-designed building that floats on a peninsula in Doha Bay. The interior was conceived by Philippe Starck as a surrealist fusion of Western luxury and Eastern detail, and the views of the Corniche, the Bay, and the Doha skyline are among the most extraordinary of any restaurant on earth. Chef Fabrice Rosso delivers seasonal tasting menus of refined French cuisine inflected with Qatari spices and local ingredients — a unique combination of architectural spectacle, culinary prestige, and unrivalled setting.
highlights: One Michelin star; atop the I.M. Pei-designed Museum of Islamic Art; Philippe Starck interior; panoramic Doha Bay views; Alain Ducasse's Qatari debut; inaugural Michelin star for Doha 2025.
restaurant_setting: Iconic museum setting with panoramic Bay views
sources: Michelin Guide Doha 2025-2026; The National; Condé Nast Traveler; Time Out Doha; 50 Best Discovery

description: Jamavar Doha is the city's most celebrated Indian fine dining restaurant — a one-Michelin-star destination at Raffles Doha in the iconic Katara Towers, sister to the Michelin-starred Jamavar London and a stalwart of the global Leela Hotels group. Chef Debdash Balaga's pan-Indian tasting menu journeys through the breadth of the subcontinent with extraordinary technical precision and ingredient quality, from the celebrated laal maas (slow-cooked lamb shank) to the lobster neeruli. Ranked among the 11 best restaurants in Doha by Condé Nast Traveler, and winner of the FACT Magazine Best Indian Fine Dining award.
highlights: One Michelin star; sister to Michelin-starred Jamavar London; Raffles Doha in Katara Towers; chef Debdash Balaga; pan-Indian tasting menu; Condé Nast Traveler Top 11 Doha.
sources: Michelin Guide Doha 2025-2026; The National; Condé Nast Traveler; Time Out Doha

description: Alba is Doha's newest Michelin-starred restaurant — promoted to one star in the 2026 guide, this northern Italian dining room at Raffles Doha within the Katara Towers is one of the most atmospherically beautiful restaurants in Qatar, with a vaulted ceiling, intimate Italian-themed décor, and an optional Romeo & Juliet balcony table for two. Chef Cristhian Serraino, winner of the 2026 Michelin Young Chef Award, produces precise Italian-focused cooking from premium European ingredients — Balfegó tuna flown from Spain, Barolo-braised veal cheek — in a setting that feels simultaneously theatrical and intimate.
highlights: One Michelin star 2026; 2026 Michelin Young Chef Award; Raffles Doha; vaulted ceiling; Balfegó tuna and Barolo-braised veal; Romeo & Juliet balcony table; named for the white truffle capital of Italy.
sources: Michelin Guide Doha 2026; Time Out Doha; Discover Qatar; The National

description: Nobu Doha is the world's largest Nobu restaurant — a Michelin Guide-selected landmark at the Four Seasons Hotel on the Corniche, set in a dramatic futuristic building that juts out over the Arabian Gulf on its own private peninsula. The combination of iconic architecture, sweeping 360-degree sea views, an open kitchen, stylish bar, and the globally celebrated Japanese-Peruvian cuisine of chef Nobu Matsuhisa creates one of Doha's most memorable dining environments. The restaurant's scale — from the main dining room to the lounge and rooftop terrace — makes it both a destination for intimate dinners and large-scale celebrations.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; world's largest Nobu; Four Seasons on the Corniche; own peninsula building over the Arabian Gulf; Japanese-Peruvian cuisine; iconic signature dishes.
restaurant_setting: Waterfront building over the Arabian Gulf
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Condé Nast Traveler; The Land of Wanderlust

description: Zuma Doha is the capital's most fashionable Japanese dining destination — a Michelin Guide-selected restaurant on Al Maha Island in Lusail with a sushi counter, robata grill, lounge with live DJ, and a terrace with panoramic views of the Qatari sea. Born from a pop-up for the 2022 FIFA World Cup that became a permanent fixture, Zuma Doha brings the globally acclaimed izakaya-style cuisine of chef Rainer Becker to one of the Gulf's most exciting luxury dining districts, alongside Carbone, LPM, Em Sherif, and Nammos. An essential booking for international visitors.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Al Maha Island with sea views; sushi counter and robata grill; live DJ lounge; part of the Gulf's premier luxury dining cluster; global Zuma brand.
restaurant_setting: Design-led dining room with waterfront terrace
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Discover Qatar; Visit Qatar

description: Carbone Doha is the Gulf's outpost of the most celebrated Italian-American restaurant in the world — a Michelin Guide-selected destination on Al Maha Island in Lusail, where Mario Carbone, Rich Torrisi, and Jeff Zalaznick's legendary New York original lands on the waterfront alongside Zuma, LPM, and Nammos. The menu pays homage to mid-century Italian-American New York with signature spicy rigatoni vodka, veal Parmesan, chicken scarpariello, and lobster ravioli, served in a dramatic room that draws Doha's most socially aspirational clientele. Consistently noted as one of the 'go-to dinner spots for stars' in Qatar.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; original New York Carbone on Al Maha Island; Mario Carbone and Rich Torrisi; iconic spicy rigatoni and veal Parmesan; waterfront celebrity favourite.
restaurant_setting: Design-led dining room with waterfront terrace
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Visit Qatar; Al Maha Island; The Land of Wanderlust

description: La Petite Maison Doha — universally known as LPM — is the most institutionalised Mediterranean restaurant in Doha's luxury dining circuit, a Michelin Guide-selected address on Al Maha Island in Lusail with a prime waterfront terrace where the sun sets behind the city skyline across the marina. The Niçoise menu of shared plates — prawns in olive oil, confit de canard, salt-baked sea bass, tarte aux fraises — is as faithful to the original Nice formula as its Dubai and Abu Dhabi counterparts, and the wine and cocktail list is as strong as anywhere in the city. A non-negotiable for international visitors who value consistency and atmosphere over novelty.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Al Maha Island marina terrace facing sunset skyline; Niçoise menu of shared plates; LPM global brand; wine and cocktail programme; business lunch value.
restaurant_setting: Elegant dining room with waterfront terrace
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Discover Qatar

description: Hakkasan Doha is one of the city's most atmospheric and consistently acclaimed Asian fine dining restaurants — a Michelin Guide-selected Cantonese destination at the St. Regis Hotel, with a signature secret-sliding-door entrance, sultry carved-wood interior, a rooftop terrace with lush greenery and city views, and one of Doha's most admired cocktail programmes. The acclaimed dim sum brunch, nominated for best Friday brunch by FACT Qatar, and the full Cantonese menu from Peking duck to black pepper ribeye make this one of the most reliably excellent restaurants in the city.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; St. Regis Hotel; signature secret sliding-door entrance; rooftop terrace with greenery and city views; acclaimed Cantonese cuisine; best Friday brunch nominated.
restaurant_setting: Design-led dining room with rooftop terrace
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; FACT Qatar; The Land of Wanderlust

description: NAMMOS Qatar is Doha's most glamorous beach club and luxury seafood dining destination — a Michelin Guide-selected restaurant on a private stretch of the Al Maha Island coastline that brings the legendary Mykonos beach club to the Arabian Gulf. The menu celebrates premium Mediterranean seafood alongside the finest beef and creative sushi in a setting of white sand and sea views, with the same lifestyle appeal that has made Nammos a byword for global celebrity dining in Greece, Dubai, and beyond. An essential destination for the city's most fashion-conscious and socially elevated diners.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Mykonos beach club on Al Maha Island private beach; premium Mediterranean seafood and beef; global celebrity clientele; Arabian Gulf waterfront.
restaurant_setting: Beachfront dining room with private beach
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Visit Qatar; Al Maha Island; Discover Qatar

description: yūn is Doha's most visually spectacular Chinese restaurant — a Michelin Guide-selected destination and winner of the 2026 Michelin Exceptional Cocktail/Mocktail Award, perched on the 44th floor of the Waldorf Astoria Doha West Bay with jaw-dropping panoramic views of the city and the Arabian Gulf. The restaurant is inspired by 1930s Shanghai glamour and serves authentic Cantonese and Taishanese cuisine — exceptional dim sum, the celebrated 'Forbidden City' roast duck served two ways — alongside an extraordinary tea-based cocktail programme that earned the special Michelin recognition.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; 2026 Michelin Exceptional Cocktail/Mocktail Award; 44th floor of Waldorf Astoria; panoramic Doha skyline views; 1930s Shanghai aesthetic; Cantonese and Taishanese cuisine.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected 2026; Time Out Doha; Discover Qatar; TripAdvisor

description: Koo Madame is Doha's most celebrated new restaurant opening and winner of the 2026 Michelin Opening of the Year Award — an opulent Chinese dining room at the Rosewood Doha inspired by the life of Madame Wellington Koo and the golden age of 1920s Shanghai. Dark lacquered wood, silk screens, chandelier light, and an enclosed wine cellar create an atmosphere of dramatic intimacy, while the menu delivers Beijing duck carved tableside, hand-pulled noodles, and exceptional dim sum alongside the innovative Gongfu Cha tea ritual and bamboo-aged cocktail programme. One of the most compelling restaurant concepts to open in the Gulf in recent years.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; 2026 Michelin Opening of the Year; Rosewood Doha; 1920s Shanghai design; Beijing duck carved tableside; Gongfu Cha tea ritual; bamboo-aged cocktails.
restaurant_setting: Design-led dining room in luxury hotel
sources: Michelin Guide Selected 2026; Time Out Doha; Discover Qatar; New In Doha

description: Shanghai Me Doha is one of Doha's most critically acclaimed new restaurant openings — a Michelin Guide-selected restaurant and winner of the 2026 Michelin Service Award that blends Chinese and Japanese flavours in a plush 1930s-inspired dining room with zodiac-themed cocktails, silver cod with yuzu miso, and short rib gyoza. The inspectors were particularly struck by the quality of the service team — described as polished, friendly, highly attentive, and genuinely knowledgeable — making this one of the most complete luxury dining experiences in the city.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; 2026 Michelin Service Award; Chinese-Japanese fusion in 1930s setting; silver cod with yuzu miso; zodiac cocktails; most praised service team in Doha.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected 2026; Discover Qatar; Marhaba

description: Curiosa by Jean-Georges is the Doha outpost of Jean-Georges Vongerichten's globally celebrated culinary empire — a Michelin Guide-selected Latin and global-inspired restaurant at the Four Seasons Hotel, overlooking the Arabian Gulf from the grounds of the hotel's spectacular Corniche address. Head chef Shreyas Kadam delivers a menu of signature Latin and regional dishes in a lively communal setting with live entertainment, capturing the warmth and conviviality of Latin dining culture at a level of luxury consistent with the Four Seasons environment.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Jean-Georges Vongerichten; Four Seasons Doha Corniche; Latin and global-inspired menu; communal dining with live entertainment; Arabian Gulf views.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Four Seasons Doha

description: Em Sherif Doha is the Gulf outpost of Lebanon's most beloved and internationally acclaimed fine dining institution — a Michelin Guide-selected restaurant on Al Maha Island with elegant interiors and a panoramic terrace with city views, where Mireille Hayek's celebrated Lebanese menu of traditional mezzeh, grilled meats, and refined Levantine compositions draws the most discerning Lebanese and international clientele in Qatar. The combination of the global Em Sherif brand, the Al Maha Island waterfront setting, and the excellence of the Lebanese culinary tradition make this one of Doha's essential dining addresses.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Em Sherif global Lebanese brand; Al Maha Island terrace with city views; Mireille Hayek's acclaimed menu; finest traditional Lebanese in Doha.
restaurant_setting: Elegant dining room with waterfront terrace
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Visit Qatar; Al Maha Island; Discover Qatar

description: La Mar by Gastón Acurio is Doha's premier Peruvian seafood destination — a Michelin Guide-selected beachfront restaurant within the grounds of the InterContinental Hotel, where the legendary Lima-born chef's vision of vibrant, shareable Peruvian cooking arrives with spectacular sea views and one of the most fun and colourful atmospheres in the city. The ceviche bar, anticuchos, and market-fresh seafood compositions deliver the full energy and colour of Lima's finest cevicherías in a coastal setting perfectly suited to the Qatari lifestyle.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Gastón Acurio's authentic Peruvian seafood; beachfront InterContinental setting; ceviche bar; market-fresh seafood; vibrant social atmosphere.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; The Land of Wanderlust

description: Morimoto Doha is one of Doha's most dramatically designed Japanese restaurants — a Michelin Guide-selected destination at the Mondrian Hotel in Lusail, where Iron Chef legend Masaharu Morimoto delivers a menu of inventive Japanese-fusion cuisine from an extraordinary space centred around a central bar and focused sushi counter. The spicy Alaskan king crab, wagyu tacos, and Morimoto chicken ramen are among the most acclaimed dishes, and the combination of culinary theatre and a deeply immersive atmosphere has made this a favourite for both omakase connoisseurs and social diners.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Iron Chef Masaharu Morimoto; Mondrian Hotel Lusail; Japanese-fusion cuisine; dramatic central bar and sushi counter; wagyu tacos and Alaskan king crab.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Art and the Some

description: COYA Doha is the city's most vibrant Peruvian-Latin social dining destination — a Michelin Guide-selected restaurant at the W Doha Hotel in West Bay, where the celebrated formula of Incan-inspired decor, live DJ sets, pisco cocktails, and a ceviches-and-anticuchos menu has created one of Doha's most reliably electric evening atmospheres. One of the few restaurants in the city that genuinely competes as both a culinary destination and a social destination, COYA consistently draws Doha's most fashion-conscious and internationally connected crowd.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; W Doha Hotel; Incan-inspired design; live DJs; pisco cocktails and ceviches; Doha's leading Peruvian-Latin social dining venue.
restaurant_setting: Design-led dining room in luxury hotel
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Seek Qatar

description: Liang is Doha's most praised new Chinese restaurant — a Michelin Guide-selected destination at the Mandarin Oriental Msheireb Downtown, where live La Mian noodle-pulling performances, Peking duck presentations, and a Sichuan tea ceremony turn every meal into a full cultural and culinary show. The restaurant combines Cantonese, Sichuanese, and northern Chinese regional cooking with Chinese antiques and cultural design elements that create an atmosphere of authentic grandeur. Time Out Doha describes the cooking as 'Michelin-standard techniques meeting approachable flavours' — the most convincing Chinese culinary argument in the city.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Mandarin Oriental Msheireb Downtown; live La Mian noodle-pulling and Sichuan tea performance; Cantonese, Sichuan and northern Chinese; Chinese antique-filled interiors.
restaurant_setting: Design-led dining room in luxury hotel
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha

description: SUSHISAMBA Doha is the first SUSHISAMBA beach club in the world — a Michelin Guide-selected Nikkei dining destination at the Waldorf Astoria Lusail that combines the globally acclaimed brand's Brazilian-Japanese-Peruvian fusion with a full beach club experience on the Lusail waterfront. The signature Samba Doha roll, creative anticuchos, funky cocktails, and the vibrant energy of a brand that has long been a fixture in London, Dubai, and Las Vegas make this one of the most scenically and gastronomically compelling openings in Doha's recent history.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; world's first SUSHISAMBA beach club; Waldorf Astoria Lusail; Nikkei Brazilian-Japanese-Peruvian fusion; Samba Doha signature roll; vibrant beach club atmosphere.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Il Love Qatar

description: Gymkhana Doha is the Gulf outpost of one of London's most acclaimed Indian restaurants — a Michelin Guide-selected destination modelled on the regal colonial Indian club aesthetic of the legendary Mayfair original, serving a menu of refined north and south Indian cuisine in a setting of extraordinary visual character. Rated among the most compelling Indian dining destinations in the Gulf by both Michelin and food media, Gymkhana brings the depth of the London original's culinary pedigree — its tasting menus, game curries, and meticulous spice work — to Doha for the first time.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; based on London's acclaimed Gymkhana; colonial Indian club aesthetic; refined North and South Indian cuisine; one of the Gulf's most serious Indian restaurants.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha; Seek Qatar

description: Rivaaj is one of Doha's most praised Indian fine dining restaurants — a Michelin Guide-selected destination at the St. Regis Doha in the city's most elegant luxury hotel complex, serving refined Indian cuisine with a contemporary twist. The menu presents classic dishes like Punjab butter chicken, tandoori chicken tikka, and prawn biryani alongside signature compositions that elevate each ingredient with care and precision. One of the very few non-hotel-branded Indian restaurants in Doha that consistently earns critical praise for the quality and authenticity of its cooking.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; St. Regis Doha; refined contemporary Indian; signature prawn biryani and Punjab butter chicken; consistently praised by food media.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Art and the Some; Time Out Doha

description: Jiwan is Doha's most uniquely situated luxury restaurant — a Michelin Bib Gourmand destination on the fourth floor of the National Museum of Qatar, one of Jean Nouvel's most extraordinary architectural achievements, where chef-crafted Qatari and Middle Eastern dishes are served beneath a ceiling of 4 million suspended pearl-like crystal beads inspired by Bedouin fishing nets, with outdoor terrace views of the Doha skyline. While categorised as Bib Gourmand, Jiwan's combination of architectural spectacle, culinary ambition, and unique Qatari cultural context make it essential for any affluent visitor to the city.
highlights: Michelin Bib Gourmand; National Museum of Qatar by Jean Nouvel; ceiling of 4 million crystal bead pearls; contemporary Qatari and Middle Eastern cuisine; terrace with Doha skyline views.
sources: Michelin Bib Gourmand; Time Out Doha; The National; ILove Qatar; Wanderlog

description: Salt Road is one of Doha's most original and compelling recent arrivals — a Michelin Guide-selected restaurant at the Andaz Doha that brings South African culinary tradition to the city with smoked beef brisket, Josper-roasted mushrooms, Cape Malay-inflected spices, and some of the finest steaks in the Gulf. Inspired by the ancient trading routes of southern Africa, Salt Road's distinctively global culinary identity — rich in wood-fire technique and bold spicing — fills a gap in Doha's fine dining landscape that no other restaurant occupies.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Andaz Doha; South African cuisine; cured brisket, Josper mushrooms, and premium steaks; unique regional identity; wood-fire and bold Cape Malay spice.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected 2026; Time Out Doha; Michelin Guide Doha official; Discover Qatar

description: Hunters Room & Grill is Doha's most acclaimed steakhouse and one of the city's most atmospheric dining rooms — a Michelin Guide-selected restaurant at the Westin Doha, recognisable by the stag sculpture at its entrance, that serves premium Australian beef and bold seafood preparations including a celebrated sea bass aguachile. The combination of a meticulously curated steakhouse identity, exceptional produce, and the warmth of an interior that feels unlike any other in the city has made this one of Doha's strongest luxury steak alternatives.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; Westin Doha; premium Australian steaks; acclaimed sea bass aguachile; signature stag sculpture entrance; one of Doha's strongest steakhouse concepts.
sources: Michelin Guide Selected 2026; Time Out Doha; Discover Qatar; Marhaba

description: Cecconi's Doha is one of the city's most socially compelling new Italian addresses — a stylish Michelin Guide-selected restaurant at The Ned Doha from the Soho House group, with a central bar, gold and teal Art Deco interiors, a wood-fired pizza oven, and a menu of northern Italian handmade pasta, premium seafood, and classic Venetian compositions. Cecconi's is the trusted Soho House brand in Italian — calm, unpretentious, and reliably high quality — transplanted to one of Doha's most design-led hotel openings with immediate success and a loyal international clientele.
highlights: Michelin Guide selected; The Ned Doha (Soho House group); northern Italian handmade pasta and wood-fired pizza; Art Deco gold and teal interior; central bar; Soho House design language.
restaurant_setting: Design-led dining room with central bar
sources: Michelin Guide Selected; Time Out Doha
